title: CAMP KC - 211info
text: CASCADE AIDS PROJECT CAMP KC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a week-long camp. Provides parental support, parent-child activities, social groups, and education materials. Camp activities may include swimming, arts and crafts, dance classes, nature hikes, and more. 520 NW Davis Street Suite 215 Portland, OR 97209 Eligibility: Families with children ages 5-15 who are living with HIV/AIDS Hours: Varies by camp Email (503) 278-3812 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 223-5907 Main phone Davis Street Office (503) 445-7699 Main phone PRISM Health Main phone (503) 278-3812 Camp KC Hanna Gustafson [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 9am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Multiple TriMet MAX and bus lines within the block Services: Camps * AIDS/HIV Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - TESTING4ALL HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - PEER-TO-PEER SUPPORT SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - CAP HOUSING SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - DROP IN CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
